# SKANF MALFORMED OUTPUT FIXTURE (SYNTHETIC)
# This fixture represents corrupted, truncated, or otherwise unexpected SKANF output.
# The parser (Story 2.4) MUST fail loudly (raise an error) when it encounters this.
# Scenarios: container OOM-killed mid-run, disk full during analysis, corrupt hex input.
